company.name_jp: 株式会社アイポケット

notes: Found representative director and officers from about page. Facebook page found.
research_notes: 代表取締役 赤澤渡 (Wataru Akazawa) found prominently on about page with message. 取締役 島田浩康, 取締役 尾崎和美 also listed in company profile section. Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/i.pocket.co.ltd found in footer and body. No LinkedIn or Twitter/X links found. Established 2001, based in Yokohama.
